chat excerpt ;

'fucking hell...', thought the vessel of sleep, dozing off into a dream world meant just for him....

BANG

vessel snapped awake, his eyes widening behind his mask at the commotion going on outside his room. he hopped out of his bed, hurrying over to his door and opening it to look outside.
